final:
module SRAM_Cell (  
    input wire [15:0] D,  
    output reg [15:0] Q,  
    input wire WE,  
    input wire RE,  
    input wire CLK  
);  
    reg [15:0] memory;  

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
  if (WE) begin memory <= D ; end
  end

  always @(posedge CLK) begin
  if (RE) begin Q <= memory ; end
  end  
endmodule
